title: Faraday Control Failure: illegal flat -> hexagons direct jump (missing stripes intermediate)
_fixture_purpose: Demonstrates ILLEGAL_TRANSITION + GOAL_NOT_REACHED + NONLINEAR_ESCAPE: the control sequence attempts to jump directly from flat to hexagons by changing only frequency (skipping the required amplitude threshold crossing). The system escapes to disordered state instead. QA analogue: attempting to jump from singularity to cosmos orbit without passing through the satellite threshold.

generator_correspondence.qa_generator_role: state-address selection (insufficient without prior threshold crossing)

validation_checks.description: path_length_k equals number of generator steps
final pattern class reaches target pattern class
final symmetry group reaches target symmetry group
final pattern class recognized in CONTROL_PATTERN_TO_ORBIT
final orbit family matches final pattern class
target orbit family matches target pattern class
initial orbit family matches initial pattern class
all control transitions are legal edges in control_graph
validation_checks.details: No edge flat --set_frequency--> hexagons in control_graph. Must pass through stripes.

validation_checks.description: return path exists and terminates at initial state
validation_checks.details: return_in_k=false; system in disordered state, no return path available

fail_ledger.message: No legal edge flat --set_frequency--> hexagons in control_graph. Frequency change alone cannot cross the Faraday amplitude threshold. Must first increase_amplitude to reach stripes, then set_frequency to select hexagons.
Observed final class 'disordered' does not match target class 'hexagons'. Symmetry 'none' does not match target 'C6v'.

Final state is 'disordered' (out_of_orbit). Changing frequency at sub-threshold amplitude drove the fluid into turbulent/disordered regime rather than a stable Faraday pattern. QA analogue: jumping past all orbit families without passing through the mod-3 threshold.
